project_type: Next.js 16 App Router marketplace with Supabase backend
build_system: pnpm with Next.js build. Must use `unset NODE_OPTIONS && pnpm build` in sandbox due to proxy-bootstrap issue.
test_framework: No test framework configured. Validation is via TypeScript compilation and build success.
verification_instructions: Run `unset NODE_OPTIONS && pnpm build` in /projects/sandbox/Khmer-Store and verify it compiles without errors and all routes are generated.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode. Node.js v22. pnpm available. Must prefix commands with `unset NODE_OPTIONS` to avoid proxy-bootstrap error. No Docker needed. Supabase not connected (env vars empty) so all Supabase calls return null gracefully.
contribution_requirements: TypeScript strict mode. Tailwind CSS v4 with custom design tokens in globals.css. Shadcn UI components in src/components/ui/. Feature-based organization under src/features/. Server actions for data mutations. Graceful fallback when Supabase is not configured.
key_patterns: Server actions return {data, error} or {error}. createClient() returns null when Supabase not configured. useAuthStore (Zustand) for client-side auth state. categories constant in src/constants/categories.ts. Inter + Playfair Display fonts. Gold accent #C6A769. Dark theme with surface/elevated layers. All pages use pt-20 for header offset.
directory_structure: src/app/ - Next.js pages (App Router). src/components/ui/ - Shadcn primitives. src/components/layout/ - Header, Footer, MobileNav. src/components/shared/ - Reusable components. src/components/animations/ - Motion wrappers. src/features/ - Feature modules (auth, listings, messages, admin) with actions/ and components/. src/lib/ - Utilities and Supabase clients. src/stores/ - Zustand stores. src/types/ - TypeScript interfaces. src/config/ - Site config. src/constants/ - Static data. src/hooks/ - Custom hooks. supabase/migrations/ - SQL schema. public/ - Static assets.
